description_long: This object represents a child with a slender build, featuring a distinct head of short, textured hair. The child is dressed in a knee-length garment with a fitted upper section and a flared lower portion, which appears to be a dress. The clothing has a dynamic, flowing appearance, suggesting movement or wind, and is adorned with a striking, patterned design. The arms and legs are elongated and stylized, with the limbs extending outward in an exaggerated manner. The surface of the object is smooth and slightly reflective, with a mix of organic and geometric forms. The overall structure is distorted, with the body and limbs stretched in a surreal, almost abstract fashion.
description: A stylized child figure in a flowing dress with exaggerated, elongated limbs and a dynamic, patterned garment. The object has a smooth, slightly reflective surface and a surreal, stretched appearance.
description_view_0: From this view, the child's head and upper torso are visible, with the dress flaring out below and the arms extending outward in a dramatic, stretched fashion.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the extreme elongation of the arm and the flowing, ribbon-like quality of the dress, with the head and hand visible at opposite ends.
description_view_2: Seen from above, the flared dress and the child's head are prominent, with the arms and garment forming a wide, V-shaped spread.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the stretched limbs and the dynamic, sweeping lines of the dress, with the head and torso appearing small relative to the extended arms.
attribute_clothing_type: knee-length dress with a fitted bodice and flared skirt
attribute_posture: arms and legs dramatically extended outward
